presets.label: Recommended Throughput
presets.description: Qwen 3.5 Flash actor with Qwen 3.5 Plus resolver. Highest overall score in repeat-based stability, with more heuristic salvage than the stable GPT resolver path.
presets.recommendation: Use when you want the highest world-turn throughput and can tolerate more heuristic salvage.
notes: Best default preset from the full world-model evaluation campaign.
Higher salvage rate than the GPT resolver preset, but stronger raw progression output.

presets.label: Recommended Stable
presets.description: Qwen 3.5 Flash actor with GPT-5.4 deep resolver. Slightly lower overall than the throughput preset, but materially cleaner and more stable repeat behavior.
presets.recommendation: Use when you care more about stable progression, lower provider friction, and lower salvage rate.
notes: Best stable progression preset from the full world-model evaluation campaign.
Also the fastest viable preset after filtering out zero-completion smoke-only winners.

presets.label: Recommended GPT54 Actor Fast
presets.description: GPT-5.4 fast actor with GPT-5.4 deep resolver. Use this when you want to move actor generation off the current Qwen Flash provider path without changing the stable resolver lane.
presets.recommendation: Use when actor-provider cleanliness matters more than actor cost, while keeping the GPT-5.4 deep resolver lane.
notes: Operational preset for switching actor generation away from qwen3.5-flash while keeping the proven stable resolver path.
Intended for fork-based live trials against existing long-running worlds.

presets.label: Slow But Stable
presets.description: Qwen 3.5 Flash actor with GPT-5.4 deep resolver, but with a larger request budget and lower concurrency so slow high-quality resolver calls can still commit ticks.
presets.recommendation: Use when you want to keep the GPT-5.4 deep resolver and are willing to trade throughput for fewer timeout-induced stalls.
notes: Not the fastest preset; this one exists for runs where request latency is acceptable but timeout-induced restarts are not.
Separates request timeout from health-check timeout so GPT-5.4 deep can finish slower resolver turns without being treated as dead.

presets.label: Smoke Benchmark MiniMax
presets.description: Qwen 3.5 Flash actor with MiniMax resolver. Useful for one-tick smoke or triage benchmarking, but not recommended for real progression.
presets.recommendation: Use only for quick one-tick benchmark comparisons or smoke checks.
notes: Looks fast in pair smoke but completed zero events in that run.
Collapsed on end-to-end latency during progression, so keep it out of production presets.

presets.label: Registry Default
presets.description: Use the current llm_registry world routes and agent selectors without forcing the evaluated preset routing.
presets.recommendation: Use for comparison against the repository's current default model routing.
notes: This preset keeps the existing registry-driven world routing behavior.
Useful as a baseline when you want to compare the repository default against evaluated presets.
